title: Paramanandayya Sishyulu
overview: When the malicious Prachandasena usurps the throne of Kalinga, the kingdom falls into anarchy. While King Vijayasena is whisked to safety by a mysterious veiled savior, the public flees to a forest hamlet led by the wise Chief Minister Paramanandayya and his bumbling disciples. Amidst the chaos, the brave Chandrasena wins the heart of Princess Leela, leading to a daring revolt. Through a blend of wit, slapstick comedy, and royal intrigue, the usurper’s greed becomes his undoing.
